proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have different PFS compared to those not receiving treatment_tamoxifen.
Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have different PFS compared to those not receiving treatment_palbociclib.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have different PFS compared to those not receiving treatment_trastuzumab.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have different PFS compared to those not receiving treatment_olaparib.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have different PFS compared to those not receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have different PFS compared to those not receiving treatment_pembrolizumab.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS: 0.043 months with treatment_tamoxifen vs -0.043 months without (t-test p=1.7690).
Mean PFS: 1.098 months with treatment_palbociclib vs -1.098 months without (t-test p=43.5412).
Mean PFS: -0.060 months with treatment_trastuzumab vs 0.060 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: -0.036 months with treatment_olaparib vs 0.036 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: -0.007 months with treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan vs 0.007 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: -0.074 months with treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.074 months without (t-test p=<0.001).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with positive er_positive have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with positive pr_positive have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with positive her2_positive have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with positive ki67_pct have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with positive tumor_size_cm have different PFS compared to those without.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS: 0.568 months with positive er_positive vs -0.568 months without (t-test p=25.5929).
Mean PFS: 0.362 months with positive pr_positive vs -0.362 months without (t-test p=16.2167).
Mean PFS: -0.459 months with positive her2_positive vs 0.459 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: 0.459 months with positive ki67_pct vs NA months without (t-test p=0.5586).
Mean PFS: -0.036 months with positive tumor_size_cm vs NA months without (t-test p=<0.001).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with has_brain_mets have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with node_positive have different PFS compared to those without.
Patients with ecog_ps have different PFS compared to those without.

analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS: -1.536 months with stage_iv vs 1.536 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: -1.050 months with has_brain_mets vs 1.050 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: -0.024 months with node_positive vs 0.024 months without (t-test p=<0.001).
Mean PFS: -0.497 months with ecog_ps vs 1.461 months without (t-test p=<0.001).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_trastuzumab on PFS differs by her2_positive status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: -0.121 months (HER2+ treated vs control diff: -0.079; HER2- treated vs control diff: -0.051). Chi-square p=3.9560.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_palbociclib on PFS differs by her2_positive status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: 2.196 months (HER2+ treated vs control diff: -0.014; HER2- treated vs control diff: 1.350). Chi-square p=1.0931.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_tamoxifen on PFS differs by er_positive status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: 0.086 months (ER+ treated vs control diff: 0.023; ER- treated vs control diff: 0.081). Chi-square p=0.6189.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_olaparib on PFS differs by pr_positive status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: -0.073 months (PR+ treated vs control diff: -0.058; PR- treated vs control diff: -0.000). Chi-square p=<0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_palbociclib on PFS differs by her2_low status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: 2.196 months (HER2-low treated vs control diff: 1.363; HER2-low- treated vs control diff: 0.943). Chi-square p=0.1599.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_olaparib on PFS differs by brca1_mutation status.
The effect of treatment_olaparib on PFS differs by brca2_mutation status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: -0.073 months (BRCA1+ treated vs control diff: 0.398; BRCA1- treated vs control diff: -0.047). Chi-square p=0.4986.
Interaction effect: -0.073 months (BRCA2+ treated vs control diff: 0.295; BRCA2- treated vs control diff: -0.045). Chi-square p=<0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of treatment_olaparib on PFS differs by brca1_mutation status.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction effect: -0.073 months (BRCA1+ treated vs control diff: 0.398; BRCA1- treated vs control diff: -0.047). Chi-square p=0.4986.
